production.playableLoop: Steer a cloth glider across rooftops, collect three mail parcels, avoid gust hazards, and land on the marked delivery pad before wind time expires.
production.objective: Collect Parcels 3/3, then land on the delivery pad before the timer reaches zero.
production.failRetry: Touching a gust hazard or timing out enters failed state; Space resets the route.

assetProvenance.fallback: Direct catalog did not provide a cohesive runtime-ready rooftop glider kit. Glider, parcel rewards, gust hazards, delivery pad, roofscape, vents, flags, skyline, and HUD are authored as a cohesive procedural mesh kit.
